recommendations.title: Vicini di casa
recommendations.overview: A couple receives an indecent proposal from their younger, more daring neighbors.

recommendations.title: A Natale mi sposo
recommendations.overview: A chef who yearns for an international reputation helps his son try to win back his ex by arranging to cater her St. Moritz wedding to another man.

recommendations.title: Matrimonio al Sud
recommendations.overview: A Milanese businessman is beside himself when his son tells him he's going to marry the daughter of a pizza maker from Naples.

recommendations.title: Tutti gli uomini del deficiente
recommendations.overview: Nearing death, videogame genius Leone Stella holds a contest to find an heir: several people named like him will compete in a live-streamed reenactment of his most famous exploits, and the winner will inherit his billion-dollar fortune.

recommendations.title: Baciato dalla fortuna
recommendations.overview: Gaetano is a divorced traffic cop in a relationship with a beautiful and exuberant woman, for whom he happily provides standards of living well above his means. He plans to propose to her, but she is thinking to run away with his handsome superior. I

recommendations.title: L'Atalante
recommendations.overview: Newly married couple Juliette and ship captain Jean struggle through marriage as they travel on the L'Atalante along with the captain's first mate and a cabin boy.

recommendations.title: Love Actually
recommendations.overview: Eight very different couples deal with their love lives in various loosely interrelated tales all set during a frantic month before Christmas in London.

recommendations.title: Gilda
recommendations.overview: A gambler discovers an old flame while in Argentina, but she's married to his new boss.

recommendations.title: So Long, My Son
recommendations.overview: Two married couples adjust to the vast social and economic changes taking place in China from the 1980s to the present.

recommendations.title: Housefull 4
recommendations.overview: Three couples who get separated from each other due to an evil ploy, reincarnate after 600 years and meet each other as history repeats itself again and their respective partners get mixed up this time.
